text:
The Adventures Of Elliot The Millennium Tales Makes A Strong Argument For Silent Protagonists Review
The Adventures of Elliot: The Millennium Tales is an old-school action-adventure game slows to a crawl with an overindulgent script.

author: GameSpot YouTube
text:
Hellraiser: Revival Is A Grotesque Survival Horror I Can't Wait For
It's raunchy, it's sexually provocative, it's shaping up to be a hell of a good time. Clive Barker's Hellraiser: Revival remains one of my most anticipated games of the year, and I have no idea how it's not rated Adults Only.
